name: texma-erp
description: TEXMA Textilveredelung ERP — Greenfield (TypeScript, modular monolith). Ablösung CDH Office. Siehe docs/lastenheft.md.

scripts.db:seed: pnpm --filter @texma/db generate && turbo run build --filter=@texma/api && node apps/api/dist/scripts/seed.js
scripts.db:setup: pnpm --filter @texma/db generate && pnpm --filter @texma/db migrate:deploy && pnpm db:seed
